mapper.sql: task_id, task_name, test_id, title, description, cron_expression, status, last_executed_at, next_execution_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, deleted, created_by, updated_by, deleted_by
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_scheduled_task
task_name = #{taskName}, test_id = #{testId}, title = #{title}, description = #{description}, cron_expression = #{cronExpression}, status = #{status}, last_executed_at = #{lastExecutedAt}, next_execution_at = #{nextExecutionAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy},
WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE t_scheduled_task SET last_executed_at = #{lastExecutedAt}, next_execution_at = #{nextExecutionAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.delete: UPDATE t_scheduled_task SET deleted = 1, deleted_at = NOW(), deleted_by = #{deletedBy} WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_scheduled_task WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM t_scheduled_task WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_scheduled_task WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT FROM t_scheduled_task WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY next_execution_at ASC
SELECT FROM t_scheduled_task WHERE status = 'active' AND deleted = 0 AND (next_execution_at IS NULL OR next_execution_at <= #{currentTime}) ORDER BY next_execution_at ASC
SELECT FROM t_scheduled_task WHERE test_id = #{testId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
